name: cli_read_file_roundtrip
description: CLI run reads a file through a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

name: cli_write_file_allowed
description: CLI run writes a file, reviews the diff, and completes.

name: cli_write_file_denied
description: CLI run fails fast when permissions block a required write.

name: cli_completion_gate_roundtrip
description: CLI run edits code, verifies it, and only then completes.

name: cli_tool_result_turn_capture
description: CLI harness captures tool-result turns sent back to the model.

name: cli_prompt_approval_allows_write
description: CLI prompt approval can authorize a blocked write and continue the task.

name: cli_prompt_approval_denies_write
description: CLI prompt denial keeps the write blocked and fails fast.

name: cli_loop_story_success
description: CLI loop completes a single story through write, verify, diff, and final completion.

name: cli_loop_story_denied
description: CLI loop blocks a forbidden write, marks the story blocked, and exits cleanly.

name: cli_loop_parallel_worktree_success
description: CLI loop with parallel workers executes through an isolated git worktree and patches the result back cleanly.

name: cli_strict_bash_roundtrip
description: CLI run executes an allowed strict-mode bash command through the real sandbox interface.

name: cli_strict_backend_blocked
description: CLI run surfaces a strict sandbox backend failure back through the model and CLI.
